title: Dorry the Giant
description: On pages 1–4, dorry the giant as luffy and the crew meet Dorry and Brogy, two giant warriors locked in a century-long duel on Little Garden.
scene: Dorry the Giant. Luffy and the crew meet Dorry and Brogy, two giant warriors locked in a century-long duel on Little Garden. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Who the hell are they, anyways?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: How could there be guys as strong as them so close to Grand Line's entrance!?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Just what the heck do you think you're doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well... in any case, I guess I should at least be glad that the girl is safe.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But you were about to cost me my 1 billion bell!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And why did you save me?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: How would you like to make a contract with me?

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on dorry the giant. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
